creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-04-24 20:32:55 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    databases            Makefile 
  Added files:
    databases/rubygem-data_objects Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  The purpose of DO.rb is to rewrite existing Ruby database drivers to conform to
  a single interface.
  At present, PostgreSQL, MySQL, and SQLite adapters are available.
  
  Author: Dirkjan Bussink (dbussink) <d.bussink@gmail.com>
  WWW:    http://rubyforge.org/projects/dorb/
  
  PR:             ports/133842
  Submitted by:   Espen Volden aka voldern <voldern at hoeggen.net>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.757     +1 -0      ports/databases/Makefile
  1.1       +24 -0     ports/databases/rubygem-data_objects/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/databases/rubygem-data_objects/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/databases/rubygem-data_objects/pkg-descr (new)
